title: Take part in four different adventurous activities.
notes:
At least two of these activities should be new to you and you should try to do them on at least two separate occasions.

You could try:

- abseiling
- canoeing
- caving or potholing
- climbing
- cycling
- dragon boating
- gliding
- hillwalking
- hiking
- hovercrafting
- mountain boarding
- night hiking
- orienteering
- paragliding
- pony trekking or horse riding
- powered aircraft
- pulling
- rafting
- sailing
- snowboarding
- stunt kiting
- sub-aqua
- surfing
- water-skiing
- windsurfing
